payload.statement: main equals origin/main, TypeScript CI and Pages are green, .graphify portable-check passes, and the graph report is built from the current integration commit.
Visual UAT confirms GraphCanvas rich parity: node shapes, dashed/bold/curved edges, alpha, hover, tooltips, and merge animation including incident links.
Studio header uses the design-system primitives/tokens, passes desktop and mobile visual UAT, and introduces no layout overlap or navigation regression.
Storage contracts cover file and Neo4j backends, configuration is documented, and the next backend decision (Spanner or generic adapter) is recorded before implementation.
ACLP-AM ontology support distinguishes reference ontology, proposed ontology, hierarchy edges, and lifecycle statuses, with double review before merge.
Track F residual rows are either ported, already-covered with test evidence, deferred with rationale, or captured in UPSTREAM_GAP/track report.
The public UAT URL and mysterypack page point to the current studio experience, not the legacy graph.html, and pass a smoke visual check.
Conductor status identifies who owns each WP, blockers, next expected deliverables, and agent/h2a liveness without duplicating work.
A harness migration plan maps superpowers rituals to explicit track/h2a/verification gates and defines a resume procedure that preserves WP status.
